labels.value: YouTube ID field not found. Please double check the field name.
Click here to View, Create and Delete Boost and Bury Rule
Use add rule tab to create new rule
Are you sure you want to save it for later?
Tell us what you need assistance with

The contribution is paid on individual request and on the basis of an individualized project for each elderly sick person, taking into account the different health and social needs and the interventions that can be activated at home. The project and the contribution are updated annually by signing an assistance project and are reconfirmed upon disbursement of regional funds.

Once the application has been submitted, an inspection will be carried out at the home of the elderly by the special commission, composed of a doctor and a social worker from the Municipality. The Geriatric Assessment Unit ascertains the non self-sufficiency of the elderly and assesses their health, welfare and social needs. On the basis of the evaluation carried out, a score is assigned for each individual situation, which allows the inclusion of those entitled to a specific waiting list. The procedure is the same also for residential and semi-residential interventions of non self-sufficient elderly
Your entry must be at least 3 characters

The undersigned is also aware that this application must be accompanied with the expression of consent to the processing of data, signed by the recipient for this socio-health assessment (except in the case of a guardian or support administrator). In the absence of consent to the processing of data, it will not be possible to proceed with socio-health evaluation / re-evaluation.
This table currently has no data to display
This is a required entry. At least 1 row must be selected.

labels.shortDescription: Showing Page x of y Pages input label middle
Showing Page x of y Pages input label prefix
Showing Page x of y Pages input label suffix
Help Text for Filter Blank Checkbox
labels.value: Check here if you want to filter rows where the value in this column is blank

Use parentheses, AND, OR, and NOT to customize the logic. For example, if you enter “(1 AND 2 AND 3) OR 4”, the flow evaluates whether the first three conditions are true or only the fourth condition is true.
You provided an unsupported value for the DataTypeFilter input on Object and Field Picker. Currently the only supported value is ’picklist’
You don\'t have the proper permissions for ths action
"Manager APEX Class" can not be empty
There are multiple groups for that role
Sharing Settings must be private or public read/write to enable manual sharing
Only the record owner or administrators can modify permissions
Your search found more than 200 results. Keep typing to make it more specific
Person filling out this form is not the beneficiary
Has the requestor received support in the last year?

La contribution prend en charge les coûts du travail de soins effectué par les travailleurs sociaux de santé, les membres de la famille ou les assistants familiaux, ou le personnel de santé sociale et pour l'achat de services tels que la téléassistance et la livraison de repas à domicile.
